content:
# 商品卡片

## 使用场景

电商类应用中展示单个商品信息的卡片组件。适用于商品列表、推荐位、搜索结果等场景。通常以网格或瀑布流形式排列。

## 布局结构

垂直布局卡片：顶部为商品封面图（占据卡片宽度），下方为信息区（商品名称 + 价格 + 加购按钮）。卡片有轻微圆角和阴影感。

整体宽度 240px，封面图高度 240px（1:1 比例），信息区约 120px 高。

## 节点树示例

```json
{
  "type": "group",
  "id": "product-card-root",
  "name": "商品卡片",
  "transform": {
    "position": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
    "size": { "width": 240, "height": 370 },
    "rotation": 0,
    "opacity": 1
  },
  "zIndex": 0,
  "locked": false,
  "children": [
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "product-card-bg",
      "name": "卡片背景",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
        "size": { "width": 240, "height": 370 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 0,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#ffffff" },
      "stroke": { "color": "#f0f0f0", "width": 1, "style": "solid" },
      "cornerRadius": 12
    },
    {
      "type": "image",
      "id": "product-cover",
      "name": "商品封面图",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 0, "y": 0 },
        "size": { "width": 240, "height": 240 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "src": "https://example.com/product.jpg",
      "objectFit": "cover"
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "product-name",
      "name": "商品名称",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 12, "y": 252 },
        "size": { "width": 216, "height": 40 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "经典款纯棉T恤 舒适透气",
      "style": {
        "fontSize": 14,
        "fontWeight": "normal",
        "color": "#262626",
        "align": "left",
        "lineHeight": 1.5
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "product-price",
      "name": "商品价格",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 12, "y": 300 },
        "size": { "width": 120, "height": 28 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "¥ 99.00",
      "style": {
        "fontSize": 20,
        "fontWeight": "bold",
        "color": "#FF4D4F",
        "align": "left",
        "lineHeight": 1.5
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "rect",
      "id": "product-add-btn-bg",
      "name": "加购按钮背景",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 172, "y": 300 },
        "size": { "width": 56, "height": 28 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 1,
      "locked": false,
      "fill": { "type": "solid", "color": "#1677FF" },
      "cornerRadius": 14
    },
    {
      "type": "text",
      "id": "product-add-btn-text",
      "name": "加购按钮文本",
      "transform": {
        "position": { "x": 172, "y": 304 },
        "size": { "width": 56, "height": 20 },
        "rotation": 0,
        "opacity": 1
      },
      "zIndex": 2,
      "locked": false,
      "content": "加购",
      "style": {
        "fontSize": 12,
        "fontWeight": "bold",
        "color": "#ffffff",
        "align": "center",
        "lineHeight": 1.5
      }
    }
  ]
}
```

## 设计要点

- 卡片圆角 12px，白色背景，浅灰边框营造卡片感
- 封面图 1:1 比例，cover 模式填充
- 商品名称最多两行，14px 主色文字
- 价格使用 20px 加粗红色 #FF4D4F 突出展示
- 加购按钮使用胶囊形状（圆角等于高度一半），主色背景白色文字
- 信息区内边距 12px

metadata.description: 商品卡片：封面图 + 商品名 + 价格 + 加购按钮
